cat > /workspace/analysis/parse_press_releases.py << 'PYEOF'
"""
Parse press release exhibits to extract key financial data and management quotes
"""
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup, XMLParsedAsHTMLWarning
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", category=XMLParsedAsHTMLWarning)

import os

pr_files = [
    ('Q4/FY2026', '/workspace/raw/transcripts/sentineloneq426exhibit991.htm'),
    ('Q3 FY2026', '/workspace/raw/transcripts/sentineloneq326exhibit991.htm'),
    ('Q2 FY2026', '/workspace/raw/transcripts/sentineloneq226exhibit991.htm'),
    ('Q1 FY2026', '/workspace/raw/transcripts/sentineloneq126exhibit991.htm'),
]

for name, fpath in pr_files:
    if not os.path.exists(fpath):
        print(f"  {name}: File not found")
        continue
    
    with open(fpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:
        content = f.read()
    
    soup = BeautifulSoup(content, 'lxml')
    text = soup.get_text(separator='\n', strip=True)
